status.title: Ship Status
status.defaultDesc: Crew member be registered under a privateer but has not yet completed the requirements.
status.pendingDesc: Crew member has met time and payment requirements, and is awaiting the captain's verification.
status.failedDesc: Crew member did not meet requirements or privateer violated the articles of agreement in gettin' the crew member.
status.lockedDesc: Crew member account is locked in the brig and no longer viable.
status.rejectedDesc: Account has permanently failed to meet the requirements — keelhauled!
status.paidDesc: Privateer has already received their doubloons for this crew member's sign-up.

faqPage.title: FAQ
faqPage.a1: We pay $100 flat commission per plunder, and this be one of the highest-payin' privateer programs.
faqPage.q2: 2. How long does it take for a sale to show up in me crew register?
faqPage.a2: It should show up immediately, arrr.
faqPage.q3: 3. I just made a sale. Where can I see it?
faqPage.a3_step2: On the bottom right side ye will see an option to View Privateer Page.
faqPage.a3_step3: Here ye can see all of yer awaiting orders and approved commissions.
faqPage.q4: 4. I know someone who needs hostin'. How do I earn a referral fee?
faqPage.a4_step2: Scroll down to the bottom to see yer privateer link.
faqPage.a4_step3: Send this link to yer acquaintance that needs hostin'.
faqPage.a4_step4: When they click on that link and order an account with us, ye earn a commission.
faqPage.q5: 5. I've been approved for the InterServer Hostin' privateer program. Now what do I do?
faqPage.a5_step1: Board yer privateer account to access InterServer marketing materials by clickin' the Flags and Links tab.
faqPage.a5_step2: Choose the marketing material ye would like to add to yer site.
faqPage.a5_step3: Ye will see flag codes on the right side of all flags; copy and paste this code to yer site.
faqPage.a5_step4: When someone clicks on that link and purchases a hostin' account, ye earn a commission.
faqPage.q6: 6. Can I PPC bid to promote InterServer Hostin'?
faqPage.a6_line1: Aye, but please do not bid on our name, variation of our name, misspellin', or any keyword that contains a portion of it including InterServer, InterServer Hostin'.
faqPage.a6_line2: Focus on bids for keywords like fast hostin', PHP hostin', WordPress hostin'.
faqPage.a6_line3: Please contact us if ye need help brainstormin' keywords.
faqPage.a6_line4: Make sure to add InterServer, InterServer Hostin', InterServer.net, InterServer web hostin' as negative campaign keywords.
faqPage.q7: 7. I've made a sale. Now when do I get me doubloons?
faqPage.a7_line1: After 90 days a valid sale will change from Ship Status Default to Awaiting Orders.
faqPage.a7_line2: Once the sale is Awaiting Orders it will be paid during the first 7 days of the month.
faqPage.q8: 8. I have a sale awaiting orders that did not get paid.
faqPage.a8_line1: There might be a few reasons for this. Sometimes we need more time to validate a sale.
faqPage.a8_line2: One easy thing to check is to make sure yer doubloon payment method is set.
faqPage.q9: 9. How long do me sales/commissions remain on awaiting orders until they are approved?
faqPage.q10: 10. Can I use me privateer link for self-referrals on accounts I'll use for personal use?
faqPage.a10: Nay! Any contact with a resold account will result in automatic failure of the sale.
faqPage.a11_intro: Keelhauled means the commission has failed permanently.
faqPage.a11_reasons: Some reasons for this could be:
faqPage.a11_reason1: The crew member has already signed up with us in the past.
faqPage.a11_reason2: The same doubloon payment method was used as another account.
faqPage.a11_reason3: The system detected that ye, the privateer, are also using the crew member's account.
faqPage.a11_policy: Since our payout of $100 per sale is often way more than we recover from the crew member even after 1 year, we have a strict articles-of-agreement policy in place to catch referrals that do not meet our guidelines. If ye are referrin' a friend or a crew member, just give them a link or a coupon. Do not share doubloon payment types and do not use the account.
faqPage.a11_reviewTos: Also please review our privateer articles of agreement here:
faqPage.q12: 12. I be a designer/developer and will refer crew members. Is that okay?
faqPage.a12_line1: This plan is not going to work with us (or any other hostin' privateer program). Once there are matches made across multiple accounts, the commissions fail.
faqPage.a12_line2: This is done to prevent the same person from signin' up and makin' doubloons off our privateer program by referrin' themselves.
faqPage.a12_line3: Ye might want to consider hostin' the crew members directly and billin' them yerself using something like PayPal. Ye can buy a reseller hostin' account from us and get started.
faqPage.q13: 13. Where can I set up me doubloon payment?
faqPage.a13: Ye can set up yer doubloon payment,
